title: trifolium pratense subvar. rotundifolium
intro: Trifolium pratense subvar. rotundifolium, also known as Red Clover, is a subvariety of the perennial legume Trifolium pratense. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include isoflavones, a type of phytoestrogen, that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Red Clover include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing cancer due to its antioxidant properties. Red Clover is commonly prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional medicine to support women's health.
